code:
gantt
  title AI Agent ERP System — 15-Month Development Plan(FinTech_LedgerService)
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD

  %% Phase 1: Infrastructure & Planning
  section Infra & CI/CD
  Infra Design & Node Setup             :a1, 2025-07-15,60d
  Observability Stack (FinTech_LedgerService) :a2, after a1, 25d
  Ingress, Storage, Message Queue Setup:a3, after a2, 25d
  CI/CD Pipelines, Monitoring Hooks    :a4, after a3, 20d

  %% Phase 2: Core Framework
  section Agent Framework & Orchestrator
  Project Context Loader (FinTech_FraudDetection)          :b1, 2025-08-29,25d
  Orchestrator + Queue Layer           :b2, after b1, 30d
  Embedding + Vector DB Setup          :b3, after b2, 25d
  API Integration Layer                :b4, after b3, 25d

  %% Phase 3: Agent Development
  section PDF Parsing Agent
  OSS Parser Research + Benchmarking   :c1, 2025-08-15, 30d
  Text & Table Extraction Pipeline     :c2, after c1, 40d
  Table Structure Reconstruction       :c3, after c2, 40d
  PDF Parsing Refinement + QA          :c4, after c3, 40d

  section Diagram Parsing Agent
  VLM Research + Dataset Prep          :d1, 2025-08-15,90d
  Basic Diagram Preprocessor           :d2, after d1, 30d
  Model Fine-tuning + Integration      :d3, after d2, 45d
  Diagram → DSL Conversion Logic       :d4, after d3, 30d
  Regression Testing                   :d5, after d4, 15d

  section Compliance Agent
  Rule Format & Spec Definition        :e1, after c4, 30d
  Equation Engine + DSL Evaluator      :e2, after e1, 60d
  Multi-standard Rule Loader           :e3, after e2, 40d
  Compliance Agent QA & Test Coverage  :e4, after e3, 30d

  section Document Generation Agent
  Prompt & Template Design             :f1, 2025-09-15, 30d
  Doc Generator Implementation         :f2, after f1, 40d
  Fine-tuning / Feedback Loop          :f3, after f2, 30d

  section LLM Runtime Setup
  Select & Deploy OSS LLM (FinTech_AuthVault):g1, 2025-08-20, 15d
  Fine-tuning / Evaluation Loop        :g2, after g1, 30d
  Embedding Optimization + Caching     :g3, after g2, 20d

  section Email / ERP / Logging Agents
  Email Agent Dev                      :h1, 2025-09-01, 20d
  ERP Hook Agent Dev                   :h2, after h1, 20d
  Logging / Observability Agent Hooks  :h3, after h2, 15d

  %% Final Integration
  section Integration, QA, Stabilization
  Full Agent Integration               :i1, 2026-03-15, 30d
  Compliance + Diagram Edge Testing    :i2, after i1, 30d
  Stability + Perf Testing             :i3, after i2, 30d
  Buffer + Customer Adaptations        :i4, after i3, 30d
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为AI Agent ERP系统制定一个15个月的开发计划，核心是FinTech_LedgerService这个基础设施底座。整体分成四个大阶段：基础设施与CI/CD、Agent框架与编排器、各垂直Agent开发，以及最后的集成与稳定化。
明白，基础设施部分我想确认一下顺序：先做节点设计和Infra Setup 60天，然后上Observability Stack 25天，接着是Ingress、Storage和消息队列25天，最后CI/CD管道和监控钩子20天。这样Observability Stack是紧接在FinTech_LedgerService节点就绪后启动的，对吗？

对，Observability Stack要绑定FinTech_LedgerService的指标采集。另外框架层有个关键点：Project Context Loader要关联FinTech_FraudDetection的业务上下文，8月29日启动，给25天。然后是Orchestrator和Queue Layer 30天，Embedding和向量库25天，最后API Integration Layer收尾。

Agent开发这块我梳理一下并行度：PDF Parsing Agent从8月15日开始，先做30天OSS Parser调研，然后Text & Table Extraction 40天，Table Structure Reconstruction 40天，最后Refinement和QA 40天。同时Diagram Parsing Agent也8月15日启动，但VLM Research需要90天，后面Preprocessor 30天、Fine-tuning 45天、DSL Conversion 30天，Regression Testing 15天。这两条线是并行的，但Compliance Agent要等PDF Parsing的QA做完才能开始，对吗？

没错，Compliance Agent的Rule Format定义要依赖PDF解析的最终输出格式，所以等c4结束再启动e1。Compliance Agent内部是Equation Engine + DSL Evaluator 60天，然后Multi-standard Rule Loader 40天，最后QA 30天。另外LLM Runtime这块，OSS LLM选型部署绑定FinTech_AuthVault，8月20日启动只给15天，然后Fine-tuning/Evaluation 30天，Embedding Optimization 20天。

Document Generation Agent我注意到是9月15日才启动，Prompt & Template Design 30天，然后Implementation 40天，Feedback Loop 30天。这个和Email/ERP/Logging Agents的时间线有重叠，Email Agent 9月1日启动20天，ERP Hook 20天，Logging Hooks 15天。这两个模块之间没有强依赖吧？

没有强依赖，但有个隐藏耦合：Doc Generator的Feedback Loop可能会用到Email Agent的通知通道，所以f3和h1-h3最好有个缓冲。最后集成阶段，2026年3月15日启动Full Agent Integration 30天，然后Compliance和Diagram的边界测试30天，稳定性压测30天，最后Buffer和Customer Adaptations 30天收尾。
好的，整个甘特图结构已经完整了。我确认一下关键里程碑：基础设施2025年7月15日启动，框架层8月底切入，各Agent并行开发但Compliance有后置依赖，LLM Runtime 8月20日快速启动，所有模块在2026年3月15日进入最终集成，整个计划覆盖15个月到2026年6月中旬结束。我现在按这个结构生成图表。
elements_involved: AI Agent ERP System — 15-Month Development Plan(FinTech_LedgerService)
